ul.li: Alignment Requirement: 8-byte aligned for swap_info_struct indexing.
Page Alignment: data field MUST be aligned to the block device sector size (usually 4096B).

div.p:
Documentation Version: 1.0.4
Struct Name: struct swap_slot_entry
Constraint: Slot size must be power-of-two plus metadata size.
uint8_t[PAGE_SIZE] Primary Page Content Raw binary block swapped out from physical RAM. Memory Alignment: 4096-byte boundary
vpn uint32_t Virtual Page Number Original virtual address mapping for page restoration.
process_id uint32_t Owner PID Unique identifier of the process owning this swap slot.
reserved uint8_t[7] Alignment Padding Padding to reach 8-byte alignment (64-bit architecture optimization).
